title: witheringia anonacea
intro: Witheringia anonacea, also known as the Andean tree daisy, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Witheringia anonacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
